batchUpload.title: Batch Import
batchUpload.subtitle: Upload multiple CVs at once for automatic analysis
batchUpload.improveWarning: Improvement takes longer (about 30-60 seconds per CV)
batchUpload.zipInfo: A ZIP file containing all exported CVs will be downloaded at the end of processing (one folder per format)
batchUpload.deleteWarning: CVs will be deleted from the database after processing. This action is irreversible.
batchUpload.deleteWarningExport: CVs will be deleted from the database after export. This action is irreversible.
batchUpload.dragDrop: Drag and drop your CVs here, or click to select
batchUpload.fileTypes: PDF, DOC, DOCX • Max 50MB per file
batchUpload.nominativeRecommendation: For better name extraction, use files named with the candidate's name (e.g., John_Doe_CV.pdf)
batchUpload.gdprInfo: Batch imported CVs are treated as internal (employees). No consent request will be sent and no candidate name is recorded.
